summary: Build a brand website for Tinyroot with updated logo/branding, a bright color theme, product listings (Multani Mitti), and business contact details.
architectural_notes: Do not display a physical address in the contact details; only show email and phone/WhatsApp.

existing_features.title: Replace all existing Tinyroot logo usages with the newly uploaded logo image (Tiny_Root_PNG.png) across the site header and footer, and ensure the logo file is added as a static asset in the frontend so it loads correctly in production.
Update the site favicon to match the newly uploaded Tinyroot logo by changing frontend/index.html to point the favicon link to the new favicon image file derived from the uploaded logo.

Switch the site to a bright color theme by updating the global theme tokens (CSS variables) so primary/secondary/accent/background feel noticeably brighter while remaining readable and consistent across all sections.
Update the Products section to display Multani Mitti variants with the exact weights and prices provided: 100gm (Rs 139) and 200gm (Rs 180).
Update all displayed company contact details to match: Email info@tinyroot.co.in, Phone/WhatsApp 9462112267, Address: Sodala Jaipur Rajasthan, 302001 (keep user-facing text in English).
Add/ensure all required generated marketing images referenced by the UI exist as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated and are used by the Hero and Products sections.

Add the uploaded product images as static frontend assets and use them as the product images in the Products section: set the 100gm product image to the uploaded file “100gm Front.jpg” and set the 200gm product image to the uploaded file “200gm Front.jpg”, replacing the current placeholder/generated image paths.

Remove the physical address from all displayed company contact details across the site UI (e.g., remove the Address card/Map link from the Contact section and remove the address lines from the Footer contact area), while keeping the email and phone/WhatsApp details.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update site branding to Tinyroot and apply the attached brand logo across the site (header/footer/favicon as needed).
Switch the site theme to a bright color palette.
Add product listings for Multani Mitti with variants: 100gm (Rs 139) and 200gm (Rs 180).
Add company contact details: email info@tinyroot.co.in, phone/WhatsApp 9462112267, address Sodala, Jaipur, Rajasthan 302001.
Use the confirmed product front photos for Multani Mitti: set “100gm Front.jpg” for the 100gm pack and “200gm Front.jpg” for the 200gm pack (replace placeholders/packshots as needed).
Remove the physical address from all displayed company contact details (keep email/phone/WhatsApp).
